AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: naughty kid
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} used to be the naughtiest of the kids around. {PAWN_possessive} pranks often went too far and caused a fight between {PAWN_objective} and the victim.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: art prodigy
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} showed extraordinary artistic talent at a young age. {PAWN_pronoun} has filled many sketchbooks with {PAWN_possessive} creative drawings.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: beloved child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: For various reasons, {PAWN_nameDef} got more love than her sisters combined. However, this also means that {PAWN_pronoun} received more expectations making {PAWN_objective} under pressure far beyond {PAWN_possessive} peers.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: kid in the monastery
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up in a monastery and was raised by the Heyran clergy. Life in the monastery gradually became boring. From then on, {PAWN_pronoun} was looking forward to the day when {PAWN_pronoun} could leave and live {PAWN_possessive} own life.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: hierarch's page
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was an attendant to a local hierarch. In return for {PAWN_possessive} labor, {PAWN_pronoun} received training in manners, literacy, combat and art.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: slow-grower
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} had a set of slow-growing horns. {PAWN_pronoun} was annoyed and concerned, and tried many ways to improve the growth rate of {PAWN_possessive} horns. Luckily it turned out just fine after {PAWN_pronoun} grew up a little bit. It remains unknown which, if any, method actually helped it. Was it the herbal medicine, the massage, or the wish {PAWN_pronoun} made to the meteor that night?

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: sky watcher
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: A pair of binoculars and a clear night sky were enough to make {PAWN_nameDef} happy. {PAWN_pronoun} would spend hours lying on the ground watching the stars as it had an unexplainable attraction to {PAWN_objective}.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: innocent child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was the purest kid among {PAWN_possessive} peers. {PAWN_pronoun} had no bad thoughts and was willing to trust others, even if it caused {PAWN_objective} to be deceived many times.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: attractive child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: Born with a beautiful look, {PAWN_nameDef} received countless praises for her cuteness since young.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: apprentice of a master
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} spent {PAWN_possessive} entire childhood learning from a master craftsman. {PAWN_pronoun} accumulated valuable experience even though children in the workshop were only permitted to do some basic work.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: competitive child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} enjoyed outsmarting other people. {PAWN_pronoun} always wanted to beat other children in exams, competitions, or even games. Once, after losing five consecutive games in Go, {PAWN_pronoun} could not control {PAWN_possessive} emotion and started a fight with the opponent furiously.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: juvenile martial artist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} practiced martial arts under a former Forbidden Army soldier. The training covered both armed and unarmed combat. As a result, {PAWN_pronoun} learned to perform deadly moves using a variety of weapons and developed a good physique.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: slingshot pro
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef}'s sister gave {PAWN_objective} a slingshot carved from branches. {PAWN_nameDef} liked it very much, and practiced shooting with many different targets, including a few birds that unfortunately became {PAWN_possessive} victims.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: clumsy child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was not good at any work that requires hands-on. If it was in the sowing season, {PAWN_pronoun} might have more seedlings crushed than planted. If {PAWN_pronoun} was sent to do the cleaning, the room could end up messier than before. After being repeatedly criticized by {PAWN_possessive} fellows, {PAWN_nameDef} swore in anger to never touch several kinds of work ever again.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: rebellious child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} could not stand {PAWN_possessive} family being strict with {PAWN_objective}. After running from home, the forest became {PAWN_possessive} hiding place. {PAWN_pronoun} managed to overcome the dangers in the forest and developed the ability to survive in the wild.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: spoiled kid
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was born in an affluent family and was provided with the best education and living conditions. However, the excessive love {PAWN_pronoun} received has made {PAWN_objective} a domineering child.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: hierarch's daughter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up in an influential family. {PAWN_pronoun} received training in archery, music and tea ceremony as those were common activities among wealthy Heyran families.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: naughty kid
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} used to be the naughtiest of the kids around. {PAWN_possessive} pranks often went too far and caused a fight between {PAWN_objective} and the victim.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: art prodigy
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} showed extraordinary artistic talent at a young age. {PAWN_pronoun} has filled many sketchbooks with {PAWN_possessive} creative drawings.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: beloved child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: For various reasons, {PAWN_nameDef} got more love than her sisters combined. However, this also means that {PAWN_pronoun} received more expectations making {PAWN_objective} under pressure far beyond {PAWN_possessive} peers.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: kid in the monastery
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up in a monastery and was raised by the Heyran clergy. Life in the monastery gradually became boring. From then on, {PAWN_pronoun} was looking forward to the day when {PAWN_pronoun} could leave and live {PAWN_possessive} own life.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: hierarch's page
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was an attendant to a local hierarch. In return for {PAWN_possessive} labor, {PAWN_pronoun} received training in manners, literacy, combat and art.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: slow-grower
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} had a set of slow-growing horns. {PAWN_pronoun} was annoyed and concerned, and tried many ways to improve the growth rate of {PAWN_possessive} horns. Luckily it turned out just fine after she grew up a little bit. It remains unknown which, if any, method actually helped it. Was it the herbal medicine, the massage, or the wish she made to the meteor that night?

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: sky watcher
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: A pair of binoculars and a clear night sky were enough to make {PAWN_nameDef} happy. {PAWN_pronoun} would spend hours lying on the ground watching the stars as it had an unexplainable attraction to {PAWN_objective}.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: innocent child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was the purest kid among {PAWN_possessive} peers. {PAWN_pronoun} had no bad thoughts and was willing to trust others, even if it caused {PAWN_objective} to be deceived many times.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: attractive child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: Born with a beautiful look, {PAWN_nameDef} received countless praises for her cuteness since young.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: apprentice of a master
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} spent {PAWN_possessive} entire childhood learning from a master craftsman. {PAWN_pronoun} accumulated valuable experience even though children in the workshop were only permitted to do some basic work.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: competitive child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} enjoyed outsmarting other people. {PAWN_pronoun} always wanted to beat other children in exams, competitions, or even games. Once, after losing five consecutive games in Go, {PAWN_pronoun} could not control {PAWN_possessive} emotion and started a fight with the opponent furiously.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: juvenile martial artist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} practiced martial arts under a former Forbidden Army soldier. The training covered both armed and unarmed combat. As a result, {PAWN_pronoun} learned to perform deadly moves using a variety of weapons and developed a good physique.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: slingshot pro
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef}'s sister gave {PAWN_objective} a slingshot carved from branches. {PAWN_nameDef} liked it very much, and practiced shooting with many different targets, including a few birds that unfortunately became {PAWN_possessive} victims.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: coralize syndrome patient
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: Unlike normal Heyras whose horns channel the spiritual power of the land creatures, {PAWN_nameDef}'s horns have the affinity to the sea. This type of situation is very rare and considered a disease. On the other hand, there are also Heyras who think coral horns are cute due to their pink color and rounded shapes.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: clumsy child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was not good at any work that requires hands-on. If it was in the sowing season, {PAWN_pronoun} might have more seedlings crushed than planted. If {PAWN_pronoun} was sent to do the cleaning, the room could end up messier than before. After being repeatedly criticized by {PAWN_possessive} fellows, {PAWN_nameDef} swore in anger to never touch several kinds of work ever again.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: rebellious child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} could not stand {PAWN_possessive} family being strict with {PAWN_objective}. After running from home, the forest became {PAWN_possessive} hiding place. {PAWN_pronoun} managed to overcome the dangers in the forest and developed the ability to survive in the wild.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: peasant child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} helped {PAWN_possessive} family from a very early age. {PAWN_pronoun} was assigned duties such as harvesting crops, collecting eggs and, occasionally, fighting the megascarabs that invaded the field. Unfortunately, the busy farm work took up the time {PAWN_pronoun} should have spent on study.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: separated child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: One day, an Infestation scourged {PAWN_nameDef}'s village. {PAWN_pronoun} and {PAWN_possessive} family were scattered in the chaos as people were desperately trying to escape. After that, {PAWN_nameDef} had to survive alone.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: wanderer child
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: A toxic fallout brought an end to the peaceful life of young {PAWN_nameDef}. {PAWN_pronoun} had to leave {PAWN_possessive} hometown and seek ways to survive in an unfamiliar city.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: spoiled kid
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was born in an affluent family and was provided with the best education and living conditions. However, the excessive love {PAWN_pronoun} received has made {PAWN_objective} a domineering child.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: hierarch's daughter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} grew up in an influential family. {PAWN_pronoun} received training in archery, music and tea ceremony as those were common activities among wealthy Heyran families.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: huntmaster
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} leads a hunt group of many less-experienced Heyra hunters. They challenge the most dangerous beasts, even the Insectoids.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: pacifist luthier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} has never forged a sword or a piece of armor. Instead, {PAWN_pronoun} made fine zithers using {PAWN_possessive} skill and craftsmanship.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: swordmaster
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} has mastered the use of the sword. {PAWN_pronoun} can land a precise hit on the fastest-moving enemies with her elegant yet deadly moves.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: merchant
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} periodically visited the nearby outlander settlements to import industrial products. These products were very profitable if sold to the Heyras. {PAWN_pronoun} has made a small fortune from the trade and was planning to expand {PAWN_possessive} business.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: rice farmer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} ran a rice paddy. {PAWN_pronoun} always favored high-yielding varieties over high-quality ones as {PAWN_pronoun} wanted to save more people from starvation.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: peasant
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} has been hired to cultivate a strawberry field for many years. Box after box of nicely-grown strawberries have been shipped out of the farm, but {PAWN_nameDef} has never tasted a single one.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: armorer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} made armor for Heyran army and the individuals that needed protection. {PAWN_possessive} workshop was small in scale and the equipment was old, but {PAWN_pronoun} worked hard with {PAWN_possessive} assistant to ensure the productivity and quality.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: builder
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} constructed houses for a living. {PAWN_pronoun} was stronger than many other workers and could carry parts that would normally require a wheelbarrow to transport.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: servant
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was employed by a Heyran shaman to do laundry, cleaning and cooking. The shaman noticed {PAWN_nameDef}'s interest in medical books and kindly gave the servant access to her book collection. {PAWN_nameDef} enjoyed reading in {PAWN_possessive} free time and learned a lot from the books.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: skilled fighter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} knows how to fight with weapons or unarmed. {PAWN_pronoun} fought in many underground arenas with more victories than losses.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: stonemason
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} cut and polished stones into bricks, grinding discs, armor pieces and many other necessaries of life. In order to obtain high-quality stones, {PAWN_pronoun} always quarried them herself.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: peace caller
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: Although most Heyras deny the possibility to make a peace treaty with Rong, {PAWN_nameDef} thought differently. {PAWN_pronoun} spent years reading historical documents, and found that ancient Heyra and Rong share the same bloodline. {PAWN_nameDef} believed this is key to the peaceful coexistence of the two.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: radical reformer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} has lived in an outlander settlement for several years and believed Realm of Heyra needed to be industrialized in all aspects. After going back to her hometown, {PAWN_pronoun} persuaded the local official to let her lead a series of reforms. Sadly most of them were hasty and did not achieve satisfactory results.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: chief architect
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} designed the palaces and gardens for Heyran nobles. {PAWN_pronoun} did not care about the cost and would pursue the pure magnificence with {PAWN_possessive} design.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: busy official
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was always exhausted by all the work assigned to {PAWN_objective}. {PAWN_pronoun} had to hire several servants to take care of the housework.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: geomancer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} inspected the vital energy that flows between heaven and earth. {PAWN_possessive} duties included locating mineral deposits, predicting the weather and giving instructions to the farmers.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: wealthy landlord
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} inherited a lot of land and wealth from the family. {PAWN_pronoun} enjoyed {PAWN_possessive} worry-free life as {PAWN_pronoun} went hunting daily for fun and delegated all the work to the servants.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: imperial pharmacist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} worked in the Imperial Pharmacy. {PAWN_pronoun} was knowledgeable in medicine and wrote several books using {PAWN_possessive} knowledge.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: governess
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} worked in rich Heyran families. {PAWN_pronoun} was responsible for supporting children's education along with wider mentoring. {PAWN_nameDef} also liked teaching children to bake cookies.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: tea fanatic
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} was addicted to tea. {PAWN_pronoun} spent a small fortune on buying the most premium tea and {PAWN_pronoun} referred to them as the "nerves-calming omnirefresher".

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: cat lover
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.baseDesc: {PAWN_nameDef} owned three cats. {PAWN_pronoun} always made {PAWN_possessive} own homemade cat food with fresh muffalo meat and berries. Once a fire took the life of {PAWN_possessive} youngest cat, which traumatized {PAWN_objective} and made {PAWN_objective} pyrophobic ever since.
